❓FAQs

Frequently Asked Questions

How long before I see results?
+
Most customers start noticing changes within 2 to 3 weeks of consistent use. Results depend on individual body type and consistency of usage.
Are these products safe?
+
Yes. All Dreambodi Naturals products are made from 100% natural herbs, vitamins, and plant extracts. No harmful chemicals or artificial ingredients.
Do you deliver nationwide?
+
Yes! We deliver to all states in Nigeria including Lagos, Abuja, Port Harcourt, Kano, Ibadan, and more. Delivery takes 1–3 working days after confirmation.
Will I gain weight in just my belly?
+
No. Our formula is designed for overall body fullness, not just stomach bloating. It supports healthy weight distribution across the body naturally.
Is it suitable for both men and women?
+
Yes. The weight gain products are suitable for all genders. Some products like the Ogbonge Sweetener and Infection Flusher are specifically designed for women.
How do I place my order?
+
Simply click any "Order on WhatsApp" button on this page, send us a message with the product you want, and we'll guide you through payment and delivery confirmation.
